code_value: Hello, everyone. I'd like to talk about my trip to Beijing. Last summer vacation, I visited some places of interest in Beijing with my friend. We went to the Palace Museum, Beihai Park, the Summer Palace and the Great Wall. I learned a lot of knowledge about Chinese art and culture. I think Beijing is a modern city with a long and rich history. It's really worth visiting. Now I am interested in the stories about Beijing. Next vacation, we are going to visit some other places and learn more. I'm sure I'll get a better understanding of the city.
